title: Non-blocking assignments in `initial` blocks treated as blocking

features.name: non-blocking assignment after posedge clock in initial block
features.description: Code should include a non-blocking assignment (<=) following a @(posedge clk) delay statement inside an initial block

features.name: non-blocking assignment in task called from initial block
features.description: Code should include a task containing a non-blocking assignment that is called from an initial block with @(posedge clk) delays
